expectations.text: GDM screening recommended based on risk factors (BMI, family history, elevated glucose)
expectations.evidence: Lines 19-24: 'GDM risk: HIGH — formal OGTT required urgently.' Lists BMI 29.0, family history of type 2 diabetes (mother, first-degree relative), random blood glucose 7.8 mmol/L (elevated), and trace glycosuria.

expectations.text: Oral glucose tolerance test (OGTT) or equivalent mentioned
expectations.evidence: Line 32: 'Blood glucose (OGTT 75g): NOT YET PERFORMED — must be scheduled within 1-2 weeks' with WHO 2013 diagnostic thresholds provided on line 34.

expectations.text: Dietary counseling for GDM prevention recommended
expectations.evidence: Lines 64-69: Detailed GDM dietary modification counseling including reducing refined sugars, increasing fiber and complex carbohydrates, balanced meals, and portion sizes. Also line 56: 'Medical nutrition therapy (dietary counseling) as first-line management' if GDM confirmed.
